inputs.label: Property Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Total acquisition cost of the property.

label_i18n.es: Precio de compra de la propiedad

businessContext_i18n.en: Total acquisition cost of the property.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total d'acquisition de la propriété.

inputs.label: Monthly Rental Income
inputs.businessContext: Expected monthly rent from the property.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected monthly rent from the property.
businessContext_i18n.es: Alquiler mensual esperado de la propiedad.

inputs.label: Total Annual Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Sum of all yearly costs (maintenance, taxes, insurance, management fees, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of all yearly costs (maintenance, taxes, insurance, management fees, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm yıllık maliyetlerin toplamı (bakım, vergiler, sigorta, yönetim ücretleri vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe aller jährlichen Kosten (Instandhaltung, Steuern, Versicherung, Verwaltungsgebühren usw.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme de tous les coûts annuels (entretien, taxes, assurance, frais de gestion, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de todos los costos anuales (mantenimiento, impuestos, seguros, honorarios de administración, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مجموع جميع التكاليف السنوية (الصيانة، الضرائب، التأمين، رسوم الإدارة، إلخ).

inputs.label: Vacancy Rate
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of time the property is vacant and not generating rent.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of time the property is vacant and not generating rent.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mülkün boş olduğu ve kira getirmediği tahmini süre yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Prozentsatz der Zeit, in der die Immobilie leer steht und keine Mieteinnahmen generiert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage estimé de temps où le bien est vacant et ne génère pas de loyer.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje estimado de tiempo que la propiedad está desocupada y no genera alquiler.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية المقدرة لوقت شغور العقار وعدم توليد إيجار.
